reviews.review_description: This game is skibdi I have painter finger but it’s a really good game and the owner is really nice 👍 so you should play

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5-stars! It would be so imposter sussy skibdi of you to go anything below that. We're glad you're enjoying our game.

reviews.review_description:
The game is called lethal ape but it’s SpongeBob playground




















 




 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
I hope













C

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

  

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

  
 

 
  
 
 
 
It’s not bad!
It is a very good gorilla tag fan game and you can explore bikini bottom and it's a good community 🤓🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌🍌
This game is a gorilla tag fan game but with SpongeBob! It has all types of building and stuff to do! The creator is so nice and updates the game more than 1 time a week!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome review and the 5 stars! I'm glad you're enjoying the SpongeBob Gorilla Tag fan game. I've been working hard to keep it fun and exciting for everyone. Your support means a lot, enjoy exploring Bikini Bottom!

reviews.review_description: So this is the first fan game I really love you the owner is very nice and funny I know you might not know me but my two gtag names are in the title but you kicked with the kick sword for fun if the let's you remember me now but I may have lost my early access hat so if I could get it back that would be great anyways it's a good game. Ps I made an idea for a horror mode at rock bottom with a bunch of sea bears. Thanks for responding. I'm really thankful, and I will check out mineshaftvr once it comes out and give it a rating for now. Keep up the good work.

developer_response.body: There is a new game I am working on now that is more popular, named MineshaftVR. It has horror

reviews.review_description: I love the detail and it also has like no toxic players which is insane to me i really recommend this game and they update the game like every week,this is a really fun and good game for the gameplay and all the moderators are good people and the owner i really recommend this game

When i let my lil sister play she said monkey and then got scared i went to see what happen i saw a user jimmy i told him how to get cosmetics when i reached him he was being racist and toxic so now i go into a private server
